sessions.summary: Investigated CX Flow activation failure for Olka Spor Malzemeleri. Root cause: Emarsys invalid field id 4032. Documented CX Flow path (JourneyService → cdp-connectors → Emarsys). Saved case + learnings to shared knowledge base.
outcomes: Root cause found: Emarsys error 2006 Invalid field id 4032
CX Flow activation path documented (not CDFLDispatcher path)
Knowledge base case + learnings pushed to team repo
Identified enforcement gap for knowledge saving across plugin users
blockers: cdp-kibana MCP failed to connect (-32000), used Playwright fallback
